is_belgian_national.name: is_belgian_national
is_belgian_national.description: The person can prove they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner: they cannot prove Belgian nationality.

is_eu_citizen.name: is_eu_citizen
is_eu_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without meeting entry or residence conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsibility_determination_.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsibility_determination_.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner under the statutory definition.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: The person presents a risk of absconding as legally established after individual examination based on objective criteria.

criterion_no_residence_application_filed.name: criterion_no_residence_application_filed
criterion_no_residence_application_filed.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit an international protection request within the statutory deadline.

criterion_used_false_information_or_frau.name: criterion_used_false_information_or_fraud
criterion_used_false_information_or_frau.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_non_cooperation_with_authoriti.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on entry, residence, establishment, and removal.

criterion_indicated_or_failed_to_comply_.name: criterion_indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
criterion_indicated_or_failed_to_comply_.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure by another member state.

criterion_subject_to_entry_ban.name: criterion_subject_to_entry_ban
criterion_subject_to_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

criterion_new_application_after_negative.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_new_application_after_negative.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their residence, or a pushback or removal measure.

criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_othe.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had already given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state for an international protection request.

criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has filed multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

criterion_concealed_prior_protection_req.name: criterion_concealed_prior_protection_request_in_other_state
criterion_concealed_prior_protection_req.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously filed an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

criterion_came_for_other_purposes.name: criterion_came_for_other_purposes
criterion_came_for_other_purposes.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they filed an international protection request or residence application.

criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unfounded.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unfounded.description: The person is subject to a fine for filing a manifestly unfounded appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
